title: VL+ Green GUI
description: Makes the GUI Of ventureland Green
body:
# The VL+ Green GUI pack
does wat it says on the tin changes ur experience on the ventuerland server by making the GUI green instaed of brown
It does this by changing the vanilla textures to a green asthetic
but also the Ventuerland specific parts of the GUI like the hotbar, also the items used for server GUI

Use this pack if u want a green GUI for the Ventureland minecraft server

![Shows Green button highlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6199d9eb44cdafa80b0716d4a9c35f57e5c1d1_0.webp)
